action.reasoning: Observation: DKT_Target_Features_Ext5 performed worse than the original Ext model. Analysis: The addition of 'total_attempts' and higher dropout might have been detrimental. The best model so far is DKT_Target_Features_Ext from iteration 14. Decision: I will revert to the exact architecture of the best Ext model, but I will add one new, highly informative feature: 'recency_correct' (the number of steps since the student last correctly answered the same skill). This provides a strong signal about recent success. I will train DKT_Target_Features_Ext6 for 25 epochs and submit for evaluation.
